caption: A young man with blond hair, wearing round glasses and white headphones, is positioned in front of a grey wall and a decorated Christmas tree. He wears a dark blue t-shirt and speaks into a black microphone. Behind him, a framed picture displays the number "20". As the sequence progresses, the man continues to talk, gesturing with his hand in the beginning before resting it. In the final frame, the perspective shifts to a screen showing a dark purple background with an overlay of a small window containing the man. On-screen text in the top right corner includes "ULTIMATE TEAM", several numbers such as "152,729", "14,600", and "1,787,969", as well as "LVL 21".
